proposals.sql: SELECT * FROM teaches WHERE year <= 2010 AND semester LIKE '%Fall%' AND instructor_name LIKE '%Mingoz%';
proposals.natural_language: Find courses taught by instructor Mingoz during Fall semesters before or in 2010.

proposals.sql: SELECT * FROM teaches WHERE semester LIKE '%Spring%' AND year >= 2004 AND instructor_name LIKE '%DAgostino%';
proposals.natural_language: Show Spring semester courses taught by DAgostino from 2004 onwards.
